title: ResolvedConfig
description: The immutable config after layered merge (flags > project > global > defaults) (ADR-0009, 03-data-model.md § 2.8). This is the resolved runtime view, not the on-disk YAML file shape.

awsProfile.description: Named profile; null = default credential chain. Bearer token is never used (ADR-0011, INV-16).

summarizerModelId.description: Optional cheaper model for compaction summaries (ADR-0006).

bedrockCallConnectTimeoutSeconds.description: NFR-BEDROCK-CALL-TIMEOUT (connect). TCP/TLS connection-establishment timeout for the Converse client; wired to the Apache httpClient connectionTimeout (ADR-0001).

bedrockCallResponseTimeoutSeconds.description: NFR-BEDROCK-CALL-TIMEOUT (overall response). End-to-end response budget for a Converse call incl. streaming/extended-thinking; wired to apiCallTimeout and the Apache httpClient socketTimeout (ADR-0001). Counts toward the retry budget.
